choice: Single full-stack Next.js app with in-process simulation
rationale: bfe61279 binds the entire deployment to 'the Next.js app, Railway Postgres, and Railway cron … all on one platform' with an explicit rationale of minimal cost and management. A separate backend service or Python engine would contradict that by introducing an additional Railway service, additional cost, and inter-service complexity. The EOD sync is already modelled as a Railway cron calling an internal Next.js API route, confirming all compute stays in-process. The Monte Carlo requirement (913da4c1) is satisfied in Node without a foreign runtime, and the repo is already a Next.js scaffold, so there is no force pulling toward a separate process.
